about.title: Who we are
about.hero_lead: DRACO Technology S.A.S. offers medicinal mushrooms as dietary supplements in capsules and tinctures. Catalog includes Ganoderma, Lion's Mane, Maitake, Turkey Tail, Cordyceps, and Shiitake. No web checkout — everything via WhatsApp.
about.who_body: We work with functional mushrooms focused on natural wellness. Due to their fibrous texture, they are not usually eaten as food — mainly as oil or alcohol tinctures, teas, and dietary supplement tablets.
about.mission_body: Bring the medicinal benefits of mushrooms in practical formats — tablets and tinctures — with clear information and direct service when closing each order.
about.vision_body: Be a reference for natural mushroom-based supplements, with transparency in composition and human support in every inquiry.
about.quality_intro: Mainly as tinctures in oil, alcohol, and teas. As a dietary supplement in tablets. Due to fibrous texture, it is not usually eaten — the value is in concentrated bioactive compounds.
about.pillar1_body: Six medicinal species with traditional backing: Reishi, Lion's Mane, Maitake, Turkey Tail, Cordyceps, and Shiitake.
about.pillar2_body: Capsules and tinctures ready to integrate into your daily routine — practical, easy-to-use formats.
about.pillar3_body: Build your order in the in-app cart and send via WhatsApp, where we agree on quantities, shipping, and address.

extract_reishi.name: Ganoderma · Reishi · Lucidum
extract_reishi.summary: Adjuvant in diabetes. Complementary treatment for respiratory and liver diseases. Anticancer properties. Regulates blood sugar naturally. Available in capsules and tincture.

extract_lion_mane.name: Lion's Mane · Hericium erinaceus
extract_lion_mane.summary: Treatment for anxiety and depression. Natural GABA producer. Hormonal regulator. Reduces digestive inflammation; useful for ulcers and gastritis. Strengthens immunity. Supports the nervous system — may help prevent Alzheimer's and Parkinson's.

extract_maitake.name: Maitake · Grifola frondosa
extract_maitake.summary: Vital energy. Anticancer properties. Treatment for fibromyalgia. Boosts the immune system. Anti-inflammatory properties.

extract_turkey_tail.name: Turkey Tail · Trametes versicolor
extract_turkey_tail.summary: Treatment for prostate inflammation. Natural antibiotic and antiviral. Helps prevent the growth of cancer cells.

extract_cordyceps.name: Cordyceps · Militaris
extract_cordyceps.summary: Increases energy naturally. Anti-aging. Sexual invigorating. Improves fertility. 60 capsules + tincture available.

extract_shiitake.name: Shiitake · Lentinula edodes
extract_shiitake.summary: Arterial cleansing. Reduces cholesterol levels. Helps reduce osteoporosis. Protects the cardiovascular system. Prevents thrombosis.
